headline: Synergis Software Launches Adept Cloud, a Cloud-Native Engineering Document Management Platform Built for Asset-Intensive Industries
summary: Synergis Software announced the general availability of Adept Cloud, a cloud-native SaaS engineering document management platform built for organizations in manufacturing, utilities, oil and gas, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and mining — where the accuracy of engineering documentation is a matter of operational safety, regulatory compliance, and project outcomes. headline: General Mills Is Fighting A Difficult Battle
summary: General Mills stock faces headwinds as the food giant struggles with declining volumes and consumer shifts toward alternatives. Read more on what could be next for this investment.

headline: General Mills to Webcast Remarks at dbAccess Global Consumer Conference on June 4, 2026
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, May 20, 2026--General Mills, Inc. (NYSE: GIS) announced that Chief Financial Officer Kofi Bruce and Chief Operating Officer (effective June 1) Dana McNabb will be featured speakers at the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference on June 4, 2026. A webcast of the live fireside chat is scheduled to begin at 1:30 a.m. CT, and a replay of the event will be available at www.generalmills.com/investors.

headline: General Mills Taps New COO As Bold Fruit Snacks Test Growth Story
summary: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) has promoted Dana McNabb to Chief Operating Officer, effective June 1, 2026. The company is rolling out new fruit snack products, including Gushers Super Sour and Gushers Sweet & Fiery, aligned with current flavor and snacking trends. General Mills, a major packaged food company, is using this leadership change and product launch to stay closely aligned with how people are eating and snacking today. The move into bold flavors and clean-label fruit snacks reflects...
